title: Image rendering utilities for scene graph nodes and thumbnails
purpose: Provides functions to render specific nodes or entire pages from a scene graph into image formats like PNG, JPG, or WEBP using Skia rendering.

methods.name: computeContentBounds
methods.normalized_params: (graph: SceneGraph, nodeIds: string[]): { minX: number; minY: number; maxX: number; maxY: number } | null

steps.content: Initialize bounding coordinates to infinity and negative infinity.
Iterate through each node ID to compute the overall bounding box.
Skip nodes that are not found or not visible.
Update the minimum and maximum coordinates based on node position and dimensions.
Return null if no valid nodes were processed.
Return the computed bounding box coordinates.
Map the export format to the corresponding CanvasKit image format.
Return JPEG format for JPG export.
Return WEBP format for WEBP export.
Return PNG format for all other cases including PNG.

methods.name: renderToSurface
methods.normalized_params: (ck: CanvasKit, renderer: SkiaRenderer, graph: SceneGraph, pageId: string, width: number, height: number, format: ExportFormat, quality: number, setup: (canvas: import('canvaskit-wasm').Canvas) => void): Uint8Array | null

steps.content: Create a surface with specified dimensions.
Return null if surface creation fails.
Obtain the canvas from the surface.
Execute the setup function to configure the canvas.
Render the scene to the canvas using the provided renderer.
Flush the surface to ensure all drawing operations are completed.
Take a snapshot of the surface as an image.
Encode the image to bytes using the specified format and quality.
Clean up the image and surface resources.
Return the encoded image bytes or null if encoding fails.

methods.name: renderNodesToImage
methods.normalized_params: (ck: CanvasKit, renderer: SkiaRenderer, graph: SceneGraph, pageId: string, nodeIds: string[], options: RenderOptions): Uint8Array | null

steps.content: Compute the bounding box of the specified nodes.
Return null if no valid bounding box could be computed.
Calculate the pixel dimensions based on the bounding box and scale factor.
Return null if calculated pixel dimensions are invalid.
Determine the quality setting based on the export format.
Render the nodes to a surface using the computed dimensions and setup.
Return the rendered image bytes or null if rendering fails.

methods.name: renderThumbnail
methods.normalized_params: (ck: CanvasKit, renderer: SkiaRenderer, graph: SceneGraph, pageId: string, width: number, height: number): Uint8Array | null

steps.content: Retrieve the page node and verify it has child nodes.
Return null if the page is not found or has no children.
Compute the bounding box of the page's child nodes.
Return null if no valid bounding box could be computed.
Calculate the scale factor to fit the content within the thumbnail dimensions.
Render the thumbnail to a surface using the calculated scale and offset.
Return the rendered thumbnail bytes or null if rendering fails.
